summary: Iteration 104 regression testing complete. All requested features verified after hydration changes in index.js. Fixed webpack cookie module error during testing. Key verifications: 1) Homepage loads correctly with hydration support (createRoot branch in dev mode), 2) Blog page loads with 5 articles, 3) Individual blog article pages render full content, 4) Product quiz loads and works, 5) Pricing page (lazy-loaded) loads correctly, 6) Tools page loads with calculators, 7) Comparison page loads with Tool Recommender, 8) Sample product analysis page loads, 9) Backend APIs working (blog posts, leads capture, health), 10) Import fix in tasks.py verified (from routes.blog import _generate_blog_post).
passed_tests: Homepage (/) loads correctly after index.js hydration changes
/blog page loads with 5 articles (TikTok, VAT, Validate visible)
/blog/how-to-validate-product-idea-uk individual article page loads with full content
Navigation between pages works (code splitting + hydration)
Import fix verified: from routes.blog import _generate_blog_post (line 649 in tasks.py)
critical_code_review_comments: index.js hydration logic is correct: uses hydrateRoot() when pre-rendered content exists (rootElement.hasChildNodes()), otherwise createRoot()
In dev mode, the else branch (createRoot) executes since there's no pre-rendered content - this is expected behavior
react-snap configuration in package.json is correct with 30 marketing pages configured for pre-rendering
Import fix in tasks.py (line 649) correctly imports _generate_blog_post from routes.blog instead of server
GA4 configuration is already wired in index.html - user just needs to set REACT_APP_GA4_ID in production .env
updated_files: /app/frontend/package.json (added cookie dependency to fix webpack error)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 104 was a regression test after modifying index.js for react-snap hydration support. The hydration logic works correctly: in dev mode, createRoot() is used (no pre-rendered content), in production builds with react-snap, hydrateRoot() will be used. Fixed a webpack cookie module error by reinstalling the cookie package. All marketing pages load correctly: /, /blog, /blog/{slug}, /product-quiz, /pricing, /tools, /compare/jungle-scout-vs-trendscout, /sample-product-analysis. The import fix in tasks.py (from routes.blog import _generate_blog_post) is verified correct.

hydration_support.logic: Uses hydrateRoot() when rootElement.hasChildNodes() (pre-rendered), otherwise createRoot()
hydration_support.dev_mode_behavior: createRoot() branch executes (no pre-rendered content in dev)
hydration_support.production_behavior: hydrateRoot() will execute after react-snap pre-renders pages

ga4_setup.status: Already wired, needs REACT_APP_GA4_ID in production .env

cookie_module_error.issue: Webpack error: ENOENT: no such file or directory, open '/app/frontend/node_modules/cookie/dist/index.js'
